title: Dems refuse to make 2024 mistakes in the wake of tariff ruling
description: The party is betting that a strong economic message will resonate better than emphasizing that the president is violating the law with his trade agenda.
content: The party is betting that a strong economic message will resonate better than emphasizing that the president is violating the law with his trade agenda.
